message:
fix(refinery): use bd list instead of bd ready for MR discovery (gt-t5t6y)

bd ready excludes ephemeral beads, but MRs are ephemeral by design.
This caused gt refinery ready and gt mq list --ready to return no
results even when ready MRs existed in the queue.

Switch ListReadyMRs() and mq list --ready to use bd list with manual
blocker filtering, matching the pattern already used by ListBlockedMRs
and ListAllOpenMRs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
